title: Triumvirate (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Triad}}
'''Triumvirate''' can refer to:

*[[Sith Triumvirate]]
*[[Triumvirate (Galactic Alliance)]]
*[[Triumvirate (Corellian)]]
*[[Triumvirate (planets)]]; the three Tunroth homeworlds
